description:
Parent epic: V3 E1: Simplified DSL foundation

Source task 5/13 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Collapse overlapping guardrail/hook/middleware concepts into `controls`.

Epic closure criteria:
- the simplified DSL is the only documented DSL
- pre-V3 DSL shapes are removed
- DSL tests cover success, failure, and error-message quality

comments.text: Added V3 controls do input/operation/result as the public policy surface over the existing guardrail runtime. Controls now feed generated input/tool/output guardrail helpers and compile-time validation. Verification: mix format --check-formatted, mix compile --warnings-as-errors, mix test test/jidoka/dsl_validation_test.exs, mix test.

title: E1: Collapse overlapping guardrail/hook/middleware concepts into controls
